etymology.description: äşĽ (gather, or mouth) + ĺ†Š (book) = gathering books or reading aloud -> meaning related to order or logic
etymology.interpretation: The character äľ–(lĂşn) combines äşĽ, which can symbolize gathering or a mouth speaking, with ĺ†Š, meaning 'book', to depict an action associated with organizing or arranging books, ultimately indicating order or coherence.
